🚨 GAUTAM GAMBHIR ANGRY STATEMENT ON GAUTAM GAMBHIR 🚨 

Gautam Gambhir said: "Was there any change where the vice-captain was removed and Virat Kohli was made the vice-captain? Has it ever happened that the vice-captain was removed, but the captain remained right where he was? That would have never happened. If it has happened, you can ask people and confront me. And you can also get back to me on this."
